title: Analytic Curvature of Log-Speed

atlas.validation_rule: exactly-two-channel ordered carriers containing label 5 or 6 whose sorted external-spin family is absent from the label-1-to-4 atlas

reference.method: central difference of the analytically computed log-speed slope

stopping_rule: No change of formula, atlas, steps, thresholds or carrier exclusions after evaluation. Failure is retained as the module result.
claim_ceiling: Analytic third differentiation of the finite q-6j recoupling formula reproduces the anchor curvature of log-speed on the declared new-label atlas.
evidence_rule: No statement from the Gemini advisory report is used as evidence.
